description_long: This is a luxurious chessboard set featuring a striking black and white marble design with gold veining throughout the playing surface. The board is square, with alternating light and dark squares, and is bordered by a thick, glossy black marble frame. The chess pieces are ornate and substantial, crafted in matching black and white marble, each with intricate sculptural details. The overall appearance is elegant and high-end, suitable for display in upscale urban environments such as parks, plazas, or luxury lounges. The board and pieces both exhibit a polished, reflective finish, enhancing the visual richness of the materials. The set is solid and heavy, indicating a premium build quality.
description: A luxurious black and white marble chessboard with gold veining, featuring ornate marble chess pieces and a glossy black border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chessboard with all pieces arranged for play, highlighting the alternating marble squares and ornate pieces.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the marble border and the profile of the chess pieces, with the board's glossy finish visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite side's chess pieces and the detailed marble pattern on the board.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the other set of chess pieces and the depth of the marble border.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of an 8x8 grid of square tiles, alternating between polished white marble with gold veining and deep black marble, creating a classic checkerboard pattern. The squares are perfectly aligned and evenly sized, with the gold veining adding a touch of luxury and uniqueness to each light square.
attribute_border_design: The border is a thick, glossy black marble frame with subtle white veining, providing a bold and elegant contrast to the playing surface. The border is wide and smooth, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, emphasizing the luxurious material and craftsmanship.
